title: Bunnycraft
description: QoL modpack for the use on the Bunnycraft SMP
body:
# The Bunnycraft Modpack on the Bunnycraft SMP

## The Bunnycraft SMP
It is finally happening!
The Bunnycraft SMP is opening it's doors on **Febuary 9th 2025**!

It is an open invite server for anyone **18+(!)** to join (As long as slots are open) So come on in and join!
To be whitelisted just join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/wZJJneprPW), have a nice chat there or on the server.

![bunnycraft_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d15b82249eaff0db6cd7d763ea373484747094_0.webp)

## The Modpack
The QoL modpack, completely overhauled on 1.21.5 for the use on Bunnycraft SMP.

>For now, the Quilt version is discontinued. If you want a more "pretty" version with additional optical features, check out the [Deluxe version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bunnycraft-deluxe). 

---
# The Mods
Currently included mods:

- [bad packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom)
- ~~[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)~~
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
- [Fabric API (For the use with Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Reese’s Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [ShulkerboxTooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Status](https://modrinth.com/mod/status)
- [ThreadTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)
- [Xaero’s Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero’s Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

---
# Information
The modpack is handselected to improve performance and qol on Bunnycraft SMP.
We would like to thank all the hardworking developers for their mods, heart and soul, the poured into it!
